name: eval-harness
summary: Select and execute relevant deterministic, product, eval-suite, live-agent eval, and regression-promotion rows.

mcp.boundary_notes: This skill orchestrates existing public product routes, eval suites, and private runner mechanics. It does not expose robot capabilities or private evaluator truth.

capability_requirements.notes: Selected rows may require household world, manipulation, episode, visual-grounding, live coding-agent, Agent SDK, eval-suite, or simulator runtime support depending on matched signals.

scripts.summary: Builds an auditable eval-harness manifest from plan text, git diff files, and explicit axis overrides.
Writes JSON/Markdown/HTML eval-harness manifests and optionally executes selected rows.

refactor_signals: selection rules become hard to audit from deterministic source signals
eval orchestration starts moving task behavior out of task skills
multiple repos need the same eval-harness manifest contract
